name: mobius
description: Local-only opt-in objective, route, evidence, and recorded review gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan it, loop it, accept only by recorded review.
interface.longDescription: Mobius is a local-only, opt-in project-private state machine for explicitly targeted objectives. Users create a locked contract with mobius-plan, then mobius-loop drives work items through route runs, evidence, review targets, and recorded judgments until a terminal result or real stop condition.
defaultPrompt: Create and lock a Mobius objective contract.
Run a locked Mobius objective through route-run review.
